subcodes.first_line: On this second night of the blessed Ramadan, Mustafa hath besought the Lord of all beings that mention from the Most Exalted Pen [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: در این لیل دوم رمضان المبارک مصطفی از مالک وری مسئلت نموده که از قلم اعلی ذکر
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @exhortations and counsels, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @praise and encouragement
